## Description

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | (e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04) |
| Node version | (e.g. 18.17.0) |
| Browser | (e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125) |
| Wallet | (e.g. MetaMask 11.9, Rabby) |
| Network | (e.g. Oasis Sapphire Testnet) |
| Component | (dashboard / circuits / contracts / Rust core) |

```
Paste logs here
```

## Additional Context
